rationale: The cited paper appears methodologically central rather than incidental: it develops a dynamic attribute-level SKU choice model with state dependence, which closely matches the citing paper’s focus on attribute-based SKU-level preference modeling and its stated gap versus prior SKU-level attribute models. The thematic overlap in titles/constructs (SKU choice, attribute-level dynamics, market structure) plus a DOI-verified reference suggests a plausible foundational/comparison role that warrants full relation judgment.
